title: Dragon claws (Last Man Standing)
wikitext:
{{Infobox Item |name = Dragon claws |image = [[File:Dragon claws (Last Man Standing).png]] |release = [[3 November]] [[2016]] |update = Last Man Standing & QoL |members = No |quest = No |tradeable = No |placeholder = No |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Drop |examine = A set of fighting claws. |value = 1000 |alchable = No |weight = 5.000 |id = 20784 }} [[File:Dragon claws (Last Man Standing) detail.png|left|150px]] '''Dragon claws''' from [[Last Man Standing]] is a minigame-exclusive variant of the normal [[dragon claws]]. It can be obtained from opening the [[Chest (Last Man Standing)|chests]] with a [[bloody key]] or [[bloodier key]], or looting the [[Crate (Last Man Standing)|crates]] that spawn at random locations on the map. It is dropped on death to whoever killed you. Dragon claws are notable for their special attack, which can deal a lot of damage in quick succession. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = 41 |aslash = 57 |acrush = -4 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = 13 |dslash = 26 |dcrush = 7 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = 56 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = 2h |speed = 4 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = Claw |image = [[File:Dragon claws equipped male.png|130px]] |altimage = [[File:Dragon claws equipped female.png|140px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Claw|speed=4|attackrange=1}} ==Special attack== [[File:Slice and Dice.gif|frame|A player performing the dragon claws' special attack, ''Slice and Dice''.]] These claws feature a [[special attack]], ''Slice and Dice'', which drains 50% of the special attack bar and hits an enemy four times in succession, which is commonly used by [[player killing|PKers]] as a finisher. The damage calculation rolls against the opponent's slash defence.{{CiteForum|author=Bitterkoekje|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190905124128/http://webcache.googleusercontent.com/search?q=cache:http://services.runescape.com/m=forum/forums.ws?317,318,712,65587452,goto,2|title=Combat Formulas|postdate=10 March 2015|name=Bitterkoekje}} :''For more info regarding the special attack, see [[Dragon claws#Special attack|here]]. ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 6 June 2019 |update = PvP Changes and Deadman Beta |change = The "Wear" option was renamed to "Wield". }} {{Subject changes |date = 26 January 2017 |update = Prayers Scrolls, QoL & a Quest |change = The item was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Dragon claws (Last Man Standing) (v1) detail.png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Dragon claws (Last Man Standing) detail.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Dragon claws (Last Man Standing) v1.png|center]] |[[File:Dragon claws (Last Man Standing).png|center]] |- |3 November 2016 –
